name: revit_set_boundary_conditions
description: Creates or updates structural boundary conditions on a single element.

element_id.description: Structural element id (column, beam, brace, wall, or slab)

translations.description: Translation fixities per axis (fixed, released, spring)

rotations.description: Rotation fixities per axis (fixed, released, spring)

notes: Map BCProperties enum values to API; bypass BoundaryConditionsForm for headless use.
